zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Boyd於1422年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock17歲，母親Isabell Lyle27歲。她於大約1446年與Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭音巴可萊德波特 格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Boyd于1422年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock17岁，母亲Isabell Lyle27岁。她于大约1446年与Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年在苏格兰藍納可爾卡爾德武德享年69岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰音巴可萊德波特 格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Boyd was born in 1422, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, was 17 and her mother, Isabell Lyle, was 27. She married Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood about 1446, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1491, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Port Glasgow, Inverclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Boyd est née en 1422, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Isabell Lyle, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood environ 1446, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1491, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Port Glasgow, Inverclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Boyd 1422 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock 17 und ihre Mutter Isabell Lyle 27. Sie hat um 1446 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1491 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Port Glasgow, Inverclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood circa 1446, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Janet Boydが1422年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnockは17歳，母Isabell Lyleは27歳であった。約1446年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックでSir John Maxwell of Calderwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカルデルウッドで69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドインバークリドポルト グラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Boyd(이)가 1422년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Lyle(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 인버c리드 포트 글라스고에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Boyd nasceu em 1422, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Lyle, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood aproximadamente 1446, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Boyd родилась в 1422 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Lyle, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood около 1446 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1491 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности порт гласгоу, инвирклид, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood aproximadamente 1446, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1491, en Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Port Glasgow, Inverclyde, Escocia, Reino Unido.
